title: Monday OAuth Express Passport Module
excerpt:
Has anyone built a Monday OAuth Express Passport module by any chance? 
I know it’s easy to setup but just wondering if a module might be available.

posts.author: kamescg (kames)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone built a Monday OAuth Express Passport module by any chance?

I know it’s easy to setup but just wondering if a module might be available.

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @kamescg.
AFAICS there’s not Passport module already available for Monday.
Anyway we have built OAuth process on Nodejs with Express and it’s a quite simple piece of code.

posts.author: kamescg (kames)
posts.cookedHtml: I ended up just creating a custom endpoint (no passport strategy) and yes… it will very simple. Was just being lazy this morning and wanted to quickly install something but it’s probably definitely overkill to create a module to wrap the monday.oauthToken method.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Glad you found a solution! This is awesome to see

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
